programme.title: The Closer: Tijuana Brass
programme.desc: Brenda faces a potential mess when the bodies of two south-of-the-border detectives are found dead in the back of a truck.

programme.title: The Closer: Time Bomb
programme.desc: Brenda's newly renamed Major Crimes Division investigates the death of a teenager that the might be related to a highly organized plan to massacre hundreds of innocent people.

programme.title: The Closer: Good Faith
programme.desc: Brenda's parents are in town trying to pin down her wedding date. When a murder investigation interrupts the visit, she drags Cliff and Willie Ray along.

programme.title: The First 48: Shattered Glass
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a young mother is found beaten to death in her home, Detective Greg Johnson must fight to prove that he has enough evidence against her killer.

programme.title: The First 48: Rocky Road/ Something She Said
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a man is shot to death over a gambling dispute at an illegal after hours club. Detective Kevin Otts battles against a wall of silence as he tries to track down the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: The First 48: Heartless
programme.desc: In New Orleans, the brutal murder of a mother and her two children sends Det. Darrell Doucette on the hunt for a suspect the victims may have known.

programme.title: The First 48: Final Call/ Fatal Fury
programme.desc: A rookie detective's first case is a woman found on her bedroom floor, stabbed to death.

programme.title: The First 48: Brother's Bread/ Into the Woods
programme.desc: Detectives respond to the killing of a man who was shot while answering his door. Neighbours find a teenage girl shot dead in the woods.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Stop: Paradise/ Bad Blood
programme.desc: A migrant worker is robbed and beaten to death in Broward County. Then, in Cleveland, a man is shot dead in broad daylight at a carwash.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death by the Bayou
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a disabled teenager is sentenced to death, but the discovery of hidden eyewitness interviews casts new light on his confession.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: The Kitchen Window
programme.desc: A small beach-town community is frightened when a young waitress is found stabbed more than 100 times in her apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: The Kitchen Window
programme.desc: A small beach-town community is frightened when a young waitress is found stabbed more than 100 times in her apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates joins the hunt for a $2,000,000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: Valley of the Banished - Part 1
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: Twelve survivalists enter a punishing African location where tribes lived by a one principle: banish the weak. Deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards circle the survivalists as the 40-day challenge begins.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: Valley of the Banished - Part 2
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A survivalist is quickly targeted for banishment after twelve survivalists enter a punishing African location. The area is known for a tribe that one guiding principle: banish the weak.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Croc Shock
programme.desc: As temperatures soar, survivalists try to hunt while being hunted themselves. At Camp Murder Puddle, the group fights off a night attack by aggressive crocodiles. A team in turmoil leads to the first self-banishment of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bulent and Cat in Colombian Rainforest
programme.desc: Bulent Gurcan and Cat Orza get together virtually to catch up with each other and watch their challenge in the Colombian rainforest. They offer fresh perspective and new insights into their struggles, partner dynamics and survival tactics.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Damned in Africa
programme.desc: It's kill or be killed as survivalists Jeff and Eva journey to Madagascar and take on the unforgiving Massif D'Isalo, a nasty boa constrictor, abundant black widows and harsh desert landscape.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Don't Let the Jungle Bugs Bite
programme.desc: Avoiding dangers of a rushing river, two survivalists brave a vast cave system in the Colombian rainforest. Trying to survive three weeks, the jungle tests them with threats like venomous fer-de-lance snakes, piranhas, and biting insects everywhere.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Croc Shock
programme.desc: As temperatures soar, survivalists try to hunt while being hunted themselves. At Camp Murder Puddle, the group fights off a night attack by aggressive crocodiles. A team in turmoil leads to the first self-banishment of the challenge.

programme.desc: It's kill or be killed as survivalists Jeff and Eva journey to Madagascar and take on the unforgiving Massif D'Isalo, a nasty boa constrictor, abundant black widows and harsh desert landscape.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Epic Fail of the Year
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. Heavy D is determined to finish the endless Fail of the Year UTV build.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Flippin' Diesel
programme.desc: The diesel brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion. Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Good Bros and Goodbyes
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz SEMA build hits a snag, and the guys scramble to find a replacement. They decide to rebuild and give away their most iconic build: The Megaram.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Not So Easy Rider
programme.desc: The guys face a huge challenge when a big dollar collector asks them to slam a 1969 Chevy C10. Meanwhile, Heavy D and the guys are off to bike week at Sturgis, to check out a one-of-a-kind hydrostatic diesel motorcycle.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Yo Soy Diesel
programme.desc: A client asks Heavy D to turn a Ford F550 into a tough 6x6 farm truck that's also a showcase for biodiesel fuel, and the guys make their dreams come true when they build the first diesel Monster Jam truck.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Hotheads and Hotrods
programme.desc: Fresh off their huge win against NOLA, JJ Da Boss and the MSO hit the streets after getting called out by Quinn Shireman and his team from Kentucky. Quinn has a big mouth and the fast cars to back it up, forcing the MSO to go all hands on deck for a win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Kentucky Fried Finish
programme.desc: Race night against the Kentucky racers continues with JJ throwing a curveball and Kentucky falling behind. A face-to-face confrontation emerges on the course and tempers are boiling out of control but MSO is determined to prove why they're the best.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Meet Virginia
programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: 35 to 1
programme.desc: The Memphis family loads up their cars and heads to Battlefield Dragway in Mississippi for one of JJ's famous arm-drop competitions. Thirty-five small-tire-car racers begin round one in this exclusive event, but only one will take home the grand prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: The Memphis Tea Party
programme.desc: JJ gets a callout from Chris Bromley and his Fox-Body Mustang drivers from Massachusetts. Chelsea is excited to race her new car and Molly is out for redemption but technical difficulties make it hard for the MSO to prove they can outrun any Mustang.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: War for $10k
programme.desc: JJ invites 32 racers from all over the country to compete in Street Wars, a winner-take all event with a grand prize of $10,000. The competition is open to all, even those with pro-mods, so the MSO must focus if they want a shot at the prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Texas Roadhouse
programme.desc: MSO gets called out by Ronnie Pace and his team from Texas. It's not long before Memphis begins feeling the heat up against Ronnie's Texas-sized mouth and deep pockets, leaving it up to the more inexperienced racers to bring the MSO back into the black.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Texas Toast
programme.desc: Tricia and JJ both have chances to redeem themselves while Memphis continues to struggle against Texas. The competition is more intense than ever and one wrong move could mean it's game over for the Memphis crew.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Hard Habit To Break
programme.desc: David tries to get closer to Lana. Avery says goodbye to Ash. Geoffrey finds himself caught in the middle of a sticky situation. Ed returns home. Stephanie reunites with her mom, and drama ensues when Lisa meets with Usman's elders.

programme.title: Trading Spaces: What's Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Paige Davis, Laurie Smith and Doug Wilson relive fun, flashback moments from SuperFan neighbours.

programme.title: Trading Spaces: Battle of the Decades
programme.desc: It's a blast from the past as 'Trading Spaces' designs two rooms inspired by fun decades. Host Paige Davis, designers Kahi Lee and Carter Oosterhouse, and carpenters Joanie Sprague and Brett Tutor go back to the 1950s and 1970s.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We're Having SIX-tuplets
programme.desc: The Waldrops are a family from Alabama with three lively boys. Parents Courtney and Eric get the shock of their lives when Courtney becomes pregnant with sextuplets. They face a high-risk delivery and the stress of becoming parents of nine kids overnight.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Make Room for Quints
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle Busby defy all odds by giving birth to the first set of all girl quintuplets in the U.S. After four months in the NICU, the quints come home, and, along with four-year-old sister Blayke, turn Adam and Danielle's lives upside down.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Chaos With Quints
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle struggle to keep up with the demands of the quintuplets while also making time for four-year-old daughter Blayke. Later, a baby photo shoot with the quints turns into pure chaos when Grandma Mimi shows up late to help.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Joyce and Aprille
programme.desc: Aprille works at an auto dealership and bribes her co-workers with snacks from her stockpile.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amanda and Jess
programme.desc: Amanda tries to teach her parents to coupon so she can take some time off from shopping. Jess is a shopaholic and coupon addict.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Missy and Amy
programme.desc: Missy plans to make over $50 using coupons; Amy plans to buy over $400 worth of groceries for under $10.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: April and Chasity
programme.desc: Georgia's April and Chasity are best friends and couponing partners who are saving up for new stockpile storage buildings.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Katherine and Joel
programme.desc: Katherine will go on a major haul before taking a six-month break from couponing. Joel is a 16-year-old who is obsessed with couponing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Rudy and Gia
programme.desc: Couponer Rudy and her husband, Chase, are renewing their vows and Rudy wants to spend just $20 on the reception.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: I Got My Visa!
programme.desc: Using a unique 90-day fiancé visa, four women will travel to the U.S. to live with their overseas fiancés for the first time. Each couple will have just 90 days to decide to get married or send their international mate home.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Culture Shock
programme.desc: Living with Russ' parents takes a toll on Paola while her wild ways turns up the heat with Russ's friends.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Enough is Enough
programme.desc: Russ and Paola move into their own apartment. Aya meets Louis' ex-wife and boys for the first time. Kirlyam takes a trip to a salon where Alan learns she's been referred to a modelling agency. Aziza and Mike hit a pivotal milestone in their relationship.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: 90 Days Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Russ takes Paola to a tailgate, and later the couple's wedding plans are put into jeopardy. Alan is concerned as Kirlyam gets a big opportunity. Mike's mom confronts Aziza at her bachelorette party. Aya grows upset as Louis cuts corners on their wedding.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Didn't Expect This...
programme.desc: Mike goes AWOL after his bachelor party upsets Aziza. Alan and Kirlyam rush to prepare for their wedding. Paola shops for a wedding dress, still unsure if Russ will be called back to work. A limited budget stops Aya from having the wedding of her dreams.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paul Rodriguez

programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by actor and musician Trevor Jackson as they check out some "Superfly Action Heroes," and see what happens when plans go wrong with "Rough Drafts."

programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in 'bro-motion,' learn what it means to be 'Bbo-proof,' and study the special bro bond 'in bro we trust.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Austin Mahone
programme.desc: Recording artist Austin Mahone joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to talk about grandparents who are Grandpositive, the experience of lake aches, and things that happen only in Japan.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel laugh at some cute "Kittiots," support some people who just "Wanna Rassle," and check out some "Slippery Crooks."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Pauly D
programme.desc: DJ Pauly D of MTV's 'Jersey Shore' stops by the studio to help weed out some 'Jersey Shore Rejects' and show us what a little 'Guy Touching and Laughing' is all about.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo take sexy to the extreme in '50 shades of cray', get zero help in 'service with a shrug' and check out the heartland in 'jolly ranchers'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Steve-O
programme.desc: Legendary Jackass Steve-O joins the guys.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the snack zone, learn the dangers of hiring budget babysitters and root on reckless golf cart drivers in 'country club drift.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chief Keef

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Botched: Comic Proportions
programme.desc: A cosplayer meets with the doctors to make her body more comical. Later, Dr. Dubrow helps a woman whose previous plastic surgery left her with a heart on her butt, while Dr. Nassif operates on a woman who had her nose ruined over 30 years ago.

programme.title: Botched: To Implant or Not to Implant ... That Is the Question
programme.desc: Rodrigo Alves returns after undergoing three nasal surgeries in less than a year. Later, Terry helps a Texas chef with jarring pain from her breast implants, and a dominatrix undergoes an unconventional procedure for butt projection.

programme.title: Botched: Blowflish Lips and Crab Claw Bits
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a woman with blowfish lips, while Dr. Dubrow takes on a difficult case of crab claw breasts. Later, a male model travels all the way from Prauge in pursuit of perfection.

programme.title: Botched: J-Cup Juggernaut
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif transforms a woman whose nose has been stuck at a '7 o'clock' angle, and Dr. Dubrow helps a patient get her groove back by fixing her man-boobs. Later, a woman comes from across the pond for help with her J-sized breasts.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fun in the Sun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's soaking in the sunshine and grabbing some grub at hot spots across America. There's a coastal seafood-palooza at a Hawaiian shrimp truck, a North Carolina drive-through, a classic Florida fish house and some serious outdoor smokin'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rockstar Chefs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's meeting up with rock star chefs taking center stage in the kitchen. There's everything from a dynamite D.C. deli, to the bomb breakfast in Baltimore, to killer Creole in Los Angeles, and out-of-bounds biscuits in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Deep-Fried Favorites

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Sea-List to A-List
programme.desc: The recruits enter boot camp to see that it has been transformed into a nautical oasis, equipped with fish tanks and a live mermaid! For their skill drill challenge, the recruits dive into the world of seafood by solving a recipe riddle to make ceviche.

programme.desc: The roles are reversing in boot camp today as the recruits and chefs play the fan favorite game, Remote Control Chef. In the game, the recruits will instruct their chef on how to make a dish that they cannot see, taste, or touch.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The summer heat wave takes hold of the kitchen, and Chef Carla Hall tries to beat the heat with TV announcer Steve Higgins. They recruit red-hot chefs Kathy Sidell and Vinson Petrillo to light a fire under Bobby Flay and take him out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chef Josh Capon and sports reporter Carolyn Manno team up to make sure Bobby Flay doesn't try for a trick play. Haitian chef Jouvens Jean takes on Francophile and Seattle restaurateur Bruce Naftaly to beat Bobby at his own game.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Fiddle Around!

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Opal Fever
programme.desc: Rookie opal hunters Daniel Becker and Justin Lang leave their families behind, risking it all to chase an opal fortune. Lucky enough to stake a claim on a legendary site known as Shell Patch Reserve, they test their luck.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Opal Fever
programme.desc: Rookie opal hunters Daniel Becker and Justin Lang leave their families behind, risking it all to chase an opal fortune. Lucky enough to stake a claim on a legendary site known as Shell Patch Reserve, they test their luck.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Case Closed
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Eastman investigates a case of stolen lobster traps. A man on a dirt bike flees the scene after being stopped for speeding, and Officer Hannett sends an injured pigeon to a local wildlife rehabber.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Attacked in Alaska
programme.desc: Greg Matthews and his brothers are on a dream trip in Alaska when they cross paths with a grizzly bear. In Australia, Ella Murphy and her friends are surfing when she is violently struck in the face by a mystery assailant.

programme.title: I Was Prey: 20-Foot Terror
programme.desc: Micki Glenn is attacked by a shark during a dive trip. Hours from the nearest medical facility, she has to rely on her husband and friends to save her life. And, a couple celebrating their wedding anniversary are attacked by a giraffe while on safari.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Nowhere to Hide
programme.desc: Allena Hansen is working on her ranch in the California desert with her two rescue dogs when she is attacked by a black bear. And in Cancun, Mexico, Jonathan Schoeneman is spearfishing with his best friend when he comes face to face with a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey: One Wrong Step
programme.desc: While vacationing in South Africa, Peter Knottenbelt suddenly finds himself in the jaws of a massive crocodile. In Nova Scotia, Meg Doyle is walking her beloved dog when they're suddenly ambushed by a pair of angry raccoons.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Javan Tiger
programme.desc: Forrest delves into the vibrant island of Java in Indonesia in an attempt to find the Javan Tiger. This exotic predator was declared extinct in 2003, but recently, park rangers and locals have had sightings and are collecting evidence of its existence.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Ivory Billed Woodpecker of the Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists. The alligator and poisonous snake infested swamps of Louisiana make for a challenging mission, but he is prepared for anything.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Zanzibar Leopard
programme.desc: Forrest sets out on a history-making expedition in Zanzibar, revealing species that have never before been filmed. He captures evidence that leads to an unforgettable conclusion on the Zanzibar Leopard, an animal that was declared extinct 25 years ago.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under
programme.desc: After numerous, credible eyewitness accounts of the Tasmanian Tiger in Australia, James Cook University has researchers on the move. Forrest joins their study before heading deep into the Cape York Peninsula in his second attempt to find the species.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Madagascar Giant
programme.desc: Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes. Recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1000 years ago and Forrest scales the canopy of the jungle on a mission to prove the giant species still lives.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Black Bear Hunt
programme.desc: After a brutal winter the homesteaders need to head out to find fresh meat. With stocks dwindled their best option is to hunt the dangerous and predatory black bear.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: A singer with a drinking problem becomes the unwilling parent to three troubled teens who have nowhere else to turn. Though she seems to want nothing to do with them, new circumstances inspire her to change her situation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Captain Sandy's Yachtrageous Moments 2020
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew are back to recall the best and worst moments from three seasons sailing the Mediterranean. Captain Sandy discusses her unforgettable crews and over-the-top guests that have come aboard.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: All Hail the Queen
programme.desc: Motor yacht Sirocco braces for its most exclusive charter guest yet: The Queen of Versailles. João faces his old demons after a drunken night out as well as an increasingly defiant deck crew. A new third stew joins the boat who has Colin swooning.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: What Eze the Problem?
programme.desc: Hannah and Joao have a miscommunication over a guest excursion. In the galley, Anastasia is forced to prepare foods that go against her vegan lifestyle to please the charter guest, the 'Queen of Versailles.' June continues to struggle to impress Hannah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: A Whole Different Ball Game
programme.desc: Baseball legend Johnny Damon comes on board with a group of his rowdiest friends making the crew work double-time. June struggles to keep her radio on, which leaves Hannah frustrated. Jack and Travis get in hot water when they fail to respond to an alarm.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Peaches and Pinups
programme.desc: Corey has a chance to buy a crossbow that has not been fired in almost 40 years; will it still be in working condition? Rick blushes when a woman tries to sell her husband’s Playboy collection; will he purchase or pass on this one?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spidey Cents
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a piece of Apollo 13. Corey and Chumlee find a 1973 Husqvarna motorcycle. A customer brings in original artwork from the comic book 'Spider Man'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Peacemaker
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars reach for the sky when an 1890's Colt .45 'peacemaker' rides into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Help Wanted
programme.desc: A triple barrelled firearm made by famous European gunsmiths blasts its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Unprankable
programme.desc: A check signed by Aaron Burr is brought into the shop. Rick and Corey check out a 1960 Chevy Corvair.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Break on Through
programme.desc: A painted bedroom door from the childhood home of The Doors' Jim Morrison lands in the shop. Then, Chumlee checks out a 1988 Zelda board game. Later, Corey gets a lead on a rare, and perfectly restored, collection of Indian motorcycles.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: On a Mission to Pawn
programme.desc: The guys check out a replica of the iconic Blues Mobile from the movie 'The Blues Brothers.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: United We Stand
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out an unrestored BSA bike from World War 2. The, Rick and Chumlee find a pair of Roberto Clemente prototype sneakers. Later, Corey and Chumlee win a bet against Rick and the Old Man.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mystery Caller
programme.desc: A Superman vs. Muhammad Ali comic and an Edward Hopper charcoal piece arrive at the shop. Then, Rick begins to think the office phones are broken.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Capture the Pawn
programme.desc: A rare 1589 book with the instructions for war and fortification, an 1840s chess table, a pair of antique door knockers, and a 1800s experimental rifle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gotham Pawn
programme.desc: Limited edition Batman and Joker Bolin Guitars; a bronze sculpture by M.L. Snowden; a pair of signed Betty Crocker letters; a WWII era Adolf Hitler pincushion.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn of Liberty
programme.desc: An original Beach Boys surfboard, a magazine feature penned by Mark Twain, an early 1900s spirit hydrometer, and an originial Peter Max Statue of Liberty painting.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Racing Revolution
programme.desc: A limited edition 2014 Hertz Penske GT Mustang; a 1600s lobster tail helmet from Oliver Cromwell's army; an old fashion apple peeler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Declaration of Dopeness
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out a Civil War era carbine that has a surprise 'coffee grinder' in the shoulder stock. Rick contemplates if the unique item is worth a deal. Later on, a vintage skateboard deck makes an appearance in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawn Commandments
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get all wound up over an automaton that performs a magic trick. A seller with a Bible from the 1500s tries to make a believer out of Corey, but his go-to book expert warns him to beware of false profits.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock Stock and Two Nickel Barrels
programme.desc: A rare movie poster for John Wanye's first ever film is offered to Rick for a hefty price. Chum inspects a pair of nickel-plated pistols whose creator is claimed to be the Victorian era's most famous gun maker.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Devil Went Down to Vegas
programme.desc: A paratrooper folding bike from World War II crosses the Pawn Stars' path. Corey is face to face with an antique German clock. A fiddle signed by singer Charlie Daniels has Rick itching to make a deal. An old miner's self-rescuer finds Rick.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawns Ahoy
programme.desc: Sail away with the Pawn Stars as a peg leg pistol hobbles its way into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Killer Cap
programme.desc: A top hat and pistol said to have once belonged to a Jack the Ripper suspect have Rick greatly intrigued. Corey is set on obtaining a 1920s time clock. Rick and Chum must decide on the purchase of a slew of celebrity signatures and the rights to a game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: President's Day Sale
programme.desc: Rick is after an autographed card of President Abraham Lincoln. Corey and Chum consider paying a hefty sum for a President Bill Clinton designed golf driver shaft, until discovering that he may not have used it himself.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: The Inner Circle
programme.desc: Jeffrey Epstein leverages his considerable power and influence to avoid serious repercussions from sexual assault charges in Florida. And the accused pedophile continues to add elites to his growing social circle, including royalty.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Suicide or Murder?
programme.desc: In July 2019, Jeffrey Epstein is arrested for sex trafficking, and weeks later, he's found dying in his prison cell. When the official ruling of suicide is questioned, conspiracy theories take on new life.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Billionaire Predator
programme.desc: Reclusive billionaire Jeffrey Epstein's early years are marked by a drive to amass wealth, power, and influential friends. But in 2005, his secrets are revealed when he's accused of the sexual assault of multiple underage girls.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: The Inner Circle
programme.desc: Jeffrey Epstein leverages his considerable power and influence to avoid serious repercussions from sexual assault charges in Florida. And the accused pedophile continues to add elites to his growing social circle, including royalty.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Suicide or Murder?
programme.desc: In July 2019, Jeffrey Epstein is arrested for sex trafficking, and weeks later, he's found dying in his prison cell. When the official ruling of suicide is questioned, conspiracy theories take on new life.

programme.title: Jeffrey Dahmer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.title: Jeffrey Dahmer: Mind of a Monster
programme.desc: With access to hundreds of pages of police and FBI interview transcripts and personal testimony from family, friends, and survivors, the haunting story of how Jeffrey Dahmer went from shy adolescent to a notorious serial killer and cannibal is revealed.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: New Years Evil
programme.desc: When a popular young woman turns up murdered, investigators must piece together the last few moments of her life to determine who killed her.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: High School Homicide
programme.desc: In 1989, high school student Amy Weidner is brutally murdered while she stays home sick from school.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Who Wanted Them Dead?
programme.desc: In 2004, affluent Coral Gables couple, John and Susan Sutton, are attacked at home. Susan doesn't survive. Investigators look at an adulterous business partner and an angry client before cell phone records lead to a shooter with ties to the family.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1995, the body of a Chicago woman was found dumped on a Wisconsin highway. Investigators uncovered the shocking truth behind the victim's tragic end.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Housebound Homicide
programme.desc: Police take 10 years to track down the killer of a disabled Denver woman and establish if she was killed for her money or if there was a more personal motive.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Mother's Day Murders
programme.desc: In 1985, a young military wife and two of her three little girls were viciously murdered in their home.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder in Room 348
programme.desc: When a business traveler is found dead on the floor of his locked hotel room, a Texas detective and a veteran private investigator must think outside the box to solve the mystery and bring a remorseless killer to justice.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Flames in Paradise
programme.desc: In December of 1998, the body of telemarketing manager David Stevens is found in a torched car in La Jolla, California, the victim of homicide. Detectives encounter a rogue's gallery of suspects and outlandish leads on their way to finding the killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Night of the Machete
programme.desc: Two young couples in an Idaho apartment building walk on eggshells around a neighbor who can't stand the one couple's music and the other's dog. Tensions keep rising between all parties until finally hell breaks loose and a violent rampage erupts.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighborhood Madhouse
programme.desc: A young family moves to the paradise of Longboat Key Florida, for a better life. But when their psychologist neighbor discovers that the man of the house might be a violent criminal, she vows to protect herself - with devastating consequences.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of the Rising Gun
programme.desc: A single mother of four children finds the perfect house in New Orleans -- complete with a nice family next door. All is well until a robbery at the neighbor's home leads first to misunderstanding, then to paranoia, conflict and horrible bloodshed.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hysteria Lane
programme.desc: A couple who tragically lost their son are thrilled when a family with two boys moves in across the street. But the relationship soon sours, engulfing all of them in conflict, accusation, and finally a deadly shooting.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Big Ol' Buckeye Cabin
programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Texas Teamwork
programme.desc: The builders travel to Fredericksburg, Texas, to rebuild a special cabin they saved in Ohio.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the Barnwood Builders join the recovery efforts in their hometown of White Sulphur Springs, WV. They build a timber frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and the community builds barn wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Dairy Barn Danger

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Fowler Job
programme.desc: Reece and Stephanie gut their kitchen then work together to replace the cabinets, the countertops, the flooring and even put in new appliances.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Cohen Job
programme.desc: Partners Jen and Brandi have little to no DIY experience and their first project in their new home, and it is a BIG one.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Payne Job
programme.desc: Barrett Payne and his friend Ben Haught tear down Barrett's old staircase and try to build a new, floating, metal one. They hit a few bumps along the way, but end up with a great final product.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Zalezsak Job
programme.desc: Allison and Peter Zalezsak love everything about their home, everything except their master bathroom.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Kemezy Job
programme.desc: Victoria and her boyfriend hate their kitchen and think that a renovation is in order.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Malinowski Job
programme.desc: DJ and Molly Malinowski bought a charming home as a young couple, but three kids later, they've run out of space. DJ and Molly want to convert their unused attic into a playroom for their kids.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Luxury Deck with a Dog Staircase
programme.desc: Newlyweds Whitney and Joey have just purchased their dream home in an exclusive gated community, but the existing deck has some serious issues. It's old, rotting and doesn't fit their needs. Plus, their aging dog is having trouble using the stairs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Renovation Surprise
programme.desc: Midwestern transplants are leaving their Burbank, California rental for more space and a better commute. They find a home, move in and begin a huge renovation, only to find out they're expecting.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: West Hills, CA, newlyweds are eager to buy their first home together. He's a second-generation real estate agent so they feel confident they have the skills to lock in the perfect house.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: Reno's on, But Nobody's Home
programme.desc: A New England couple is ready to buy a bigger home for their growing family. Once renovations begin on their home, they quickly realize they may be in way over their heads.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: The Wife Runs the Reno
programme.desc: Denver natives are searching the city for a larger home for their family of four. He bought their current home before meeting his wife, so she thinks it's her turn to get what she wants.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Waffle Truth
programme.desc: Noah Cappe welcomes the changing of the seasons at the Circleville Pumpkin Show in Ohio, where pumpkin stars in both savory and sweet treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Tasty Twists
programme.desc: From a lobster and filet mignon taco donut to a classic Japanese noodle dish done as juicy burger, these chefs are serving up some of the country's most mouth-watering mashups.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Swine and Dine
programme.desc: From a triple-wide Cajun country pork chop to a sky-high stack of piggy perfection, there's almost too much pork to fit on a fork at these dining destinations.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Lessons From Nonna
programme.desc: Laura's passion for food and cooking was inspired by her Italian grandmother, who taught her not only how to cook, but how to spread love through food. Today Laura takes you on a very personal journey through her some of her Nonna's favorite dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Super Simple Suppers
programme.desc: After a long day, preparing a meal from scratch can often seem like a daunting task. Before you reach for the takeout menu, Laura will show you a simple and delicious crowd pleasing supper that's ready in a flash.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Papa's Pizza
programme.desc: Laura makes some of her dad's favorites before he joins her in the kitchen for a pizza throw down. First up Sal's grilled seafood salad with calamari and shrimp, next it's a classic margherita pizza.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Laura's Leftovers
programme.desc: There is nothing more fun and creative than making a new meal from yesterday's leftovers. Laura demonstrates her tricks for turning everyday leftovers into a delicious meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: In this show Laura makes a mouth-watering brunch that pairs both sweet and savory ingredients.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Style
programme.desc: Entertaining friends and family should be fun, but it isn't always the case. Laura shows us her secret to an impressive and stress free family meal.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Bobby's passion for cooking is matched by his love of horse racing. He serves up a brunch menu fit for the Kentucky Derby.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Cuisine du Jour
programme.desc: Bobby whisks us away to the South of France as he cooks up a delicious brunch menu inspired by one of his favorite places. All good French food is accompanied by a Baguette and Bobby toasts his with Goat Cheese.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread Lovers' Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes an essential element of brunch, bread, and makes it the star of every dish on his inventive menu from croque Madame bread pudding with herb-crusted tomatoes to a simple pull-apart cinnamon bread and a gazpacho bloody Maria.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Irish Style Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay showcases his Irish pride in this festive and colorful brunch menu including a bangers and egg sandwich with Irish cheddar and tomato jam, Irish-style potato pancakes with mustard-chive crème fraiche and smoked salmon.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Small Town to Farmville
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Nederland Heritage Festival, where food from around the world is prepared by an army of volunteers. From the cowboy pistolettes to sopapillas to chicken fried bacon and a very fun egg-stravaganza, see all the delicious delights.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet Cinnamon Roll Waffle to the hearty and delicious Breakfast Poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Signature Club A by Adrienne: Beauty Anniversary
programme.desc: A complete cosmetic line that helps conceal and camouflage the skins imperfections.

programme.desc: Discover and shop a sterling silver jewlery collection with unique gemstones from exotic locations.

programme.title: Bissell Cleaning

programme.title: Get the Math 2.0

programme.desc: Discover how predictions underpin nearly every aspect of our lives and why some succeed spectacularly while others fail. Explore entertaining real-world challenges and join experts as they tackle that age-old question: can we forecast the future.

programme.desc: Will and Carlton are given humiliating jobs as part of their initiation into a fraternity.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Fresh Prince After Dark
programme.desc: When Hilary is invited to pose for Playboy, Will and Carlton get to meet Hugh Hefner.

programme.title: Movie: White Men Can't Jump
programme.desc: A white con artist teams up with a black basketball hustler and con their way across the country.

programme.title: Movie: All About the Benjamins

programme.title: Movie: Yes, I Do

programme.title: Movie: Eat, Play, Love

programme.title: Movie: Harvest Moon

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: Frasier: The New Friend
programme.desc: Frasier tries to keep his friendship with Roz's charming ex-boyfriend a secret from her.

programme.title: Frasier: Mary Christmas
programme.desc: Frasier learns that his protégé, Dr. Mary, will co-host the Christmas parade with him.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier's Edge
programme.desc: Frasier suffers the first pangs of a sudden mid-life crisis and consults a psychologist.

programme.title: Frasier: Cranes Unplugged
programme.desc: Frasier cannot adjust to his son's indifferent attitude and new interest in girls.

programme.title: Frasier: Motor Skills
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are humiliated over their lack of knowledge about automobile repairs.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Must Go Off
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles re-discover a favourite Shakespearean actor slumming as a sci-fi star.

programme.title: Frasier: Sliding Frasiers
programme.desc: Frasier's two romantic universes collide; Niles and Daphne take a vacation in Hawaii.

programme.title: Frasier: Hungry Heart
programme.desc: Frasier intercedes to save station manager Kenny's marriage from a disastrous rendezvous.

programme.title: Good Witch: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Get a sneak peek at the upcoming season of the show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Goes to the Hospital
programme.desc: Even with the trip to the hospital carefully rehearsed, Lucy's labor doesn't go quite as planned.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Sales Resistance
programme.desc: Ricky accuses all women of having no sales resistance then has trouble himself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Inferiority Complex
programme.desc: Lucy pulls one faux pas after another and develops a devastating inferiority complex.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Club Election
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are pitted against each other for the presidency of their women's club.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride

programme.title: Movie: Chance at Romance

programme.title: The Office: Garden Party

programme.title: The Office: Doomsday

programme.title: The Office: Pam's Replacement

programme.title: The Office: Gettysburg

programme.title: The Office: Mrs. California

programme.title: The Office: Trivia

programme.title: The Office: Pool Party

programme.title: The Office: Jury Duty

programme.title: The Closer: Fate Line
programme.desc: Brenda races against time on a multiple homicide case after finding clues on a cell phone.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Love the One You're With
programme.desc: The survivors from the crash are asked to make an almost impossible decision that will affect the rest of their lives. Meanwhile, tension grows between Jackson and April after they're forced to work together.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Saw Her Standing There
programme.desc: Aware that Derek might never operate again, Meredith stops talking about the surgeries she's performing. Meanwhile, Richard calls on Dr. Catherine Avery to help him perform a complicated procedure, as things continue to heat up between Jackson and April.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Beautiful Doom
programme.desc: Meredith and Christina continue to try to come to terms with the plane crash and their new responsibilities. Meredith struggles with taking care of Zola after a case hits close to home and Christina does a complicated surgery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Second Opinion
programme.desc: As the doctors continue with their lawsuit, they're forced to confront the realities of their injuries. Meanwhile, Bailey tricks Arizona into helping her with a pediatric case, and Cristina tries to find normalcy in her new environment.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Was Made for Lovin' You
programme.desc: Cristina and Owen continue to figure out their relationship amidst the pending lawsuit; and Bailey argues with Ben over plans for their upcoming nuptials. Meanwhile, Callie recruits Jackson to help find a solution to Derek's hand, but he is preoccupied.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Love Turns You Upside Down
programme.desc: The new batch of interns finds themselves involved in all the drama at Seattle Grace.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Death Row Stories
programme.desc: Explore cases that pose hard questions about the U.S. capital punishment system.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: The Kitchen Window
programme.desc: A small beach-town community is frightened when a young waitress is found stabbed more than 100 times in her apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Beat Me in St. Louis
