programme.desc: There’s a lot of pressure living life on a submarine and that’s why naval officer Jeremy Brown and his wife, Nikki want to move out of Pearl Harbor and into the lush Hawaiian mountains. Join as they gaze over the best views Oahu real estate has to offer.

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Backyard Survival
programme.desc: Erik and Amy Eck are looking for a home in Oahu to raise their son. While the beauty of Oahu attracts most residents, it is the lifestyle of living off the land that entices in the Eck family.

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: BBQ Haven
programme.desc: Patrick and Jeannie escape the cold of Massachusetts to enjoy marvelous Maui. They want to upgrade their condo for their own piece of island life, with enough room for Patrick to barbeque – Hawaiian style.

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Explosive Living
programme.desc: Three active volcanos put residents of the Big Island in the path of lava. Joel and Lani are willing to take the risk and live on the island, but how close to the mouth of the volcano are they willing to get?

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Flying Kuaui
programme.desc: Gerry and his girlfriend Julie moved to Kauai searching for adventure. Gerry runs an adventurous business as a pilot and hang glider; he would love to find a property where he can fuse his love of excitement with a functional living space.

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: Maui's filled with deserts along the coast and lush jungles up in the mountains, many people come here to escape. Jeff and Pam want to get away from the desert and into the jungle, but will the homes be a little too wild?

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Volcano Zone
programme.desc: Jesse and his wife Tracy have been living in a tent on the Big Island for three years. They're ready to upgrade their lifestyle but they're still looking for a house where they can live off the grid.

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Big Apple to Big Island
programme.desc: DeVante is making the move from the Big Apple to the Big Island, but life out here is way different than city living. There's volcanoes, tsuanmis, even giant bugs. Will they find a house that's the perfect mix between city and country?

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Boar Island
programme.desc: Martin and Connie came to the small island of Kauai from Los Angeles. Adjusting hasn't been easy though. Between the constant rain, sea creatures, and wild boars, life out here is rustic. But Martin and Connie are here to stay and want the perfect home!

programme.title: Buying Hawaii: Beachfront Bliss
programme.desc: Many people dream of coming to live in Hawaii, but Tucker and Nicole both made that dream a reality. After huge life events, they both bought one-way tickets to Oahu and never looked back.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Frozen Plains
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the scenario of two ranchers, stranded on the windy plains in the dead of winter. Their only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Cody and Dave take on a survival scenario in South Africa's backcountry where dehydration kills in hours and hungry super-predators kill even faster. Armed with nothing but a machete, they show how to escape the bush without getting eaten alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Adrift
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the survival scenario of two castaways adrift at sea and show how to survive being stranded on a deserted jungle island in the South Pacific. This time, Dave goes barefoot.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Hippo Island
programme.desc: In Botswana's Okavango Delta, Dave and Cody seek to escape the dangerous and deadly hippo-infested marshland using only a dying GPS and waterlogged binoculars.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Up the River
programme.desc: In Kentucky, Dave and Cody take on a scenario of two kayakers who are dumped into the cold river just a few hours before sundown. To make things worse, they become separated from each other by two miles of rushing river. Then, Dave traps an irate skunk.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: In the isolated woods of Northern Maine, Cody and Dave take on the role of two travelers, lost and out of gas on an abandoned logging road. Their only resource is a broken down truck which they pillage for all it's worth including a can of dog food.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Time's Up
programme.desc: Awkwardness ensues as virgins Kirylam and Alan consummate their wedding. Louis is late for his wedding leaving Aya in doubt.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: The NeverEnding Story

programme.desc: Fernanda has a virtual date. Tiffany and Ronald seek counseling with a therapist. Jesse helps a friend who's in the hospital with COVID-19. Rachel and Jon talk with a lawyer about new delays in their visa. Jenny and Larry sing karaoke for their neighbors.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Caitlyn and Kenton
programme.desc: A young mother, Caitlyn, needs help to decipher truth from lies when it comes her handsome Facebook crush, Kenton. Kenton wants Caitlyn and her daughter to relocate to Kentucky, but she needs to know what's real before making that decision.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Chelsea and Charles
programme.desc: Nev and Max agree to help Chelsea finally meet her online boyfriend, Charles, in person. While Chelsea has only spoken to Charles once, on the phone, the guys soon show her that a picture speaks a thousand words.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Falesha and Jacqueline
programme.desc: Falesha's name and pictures were stolen by a fake profile that nearly ruined her life. She thought her troubles were behind her, but four years later her past comes back to haunt her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Angel and Antonio
programme.desc: Laura joins Nev to help Angel find her online love, Antonio. He claims to live in Angel's small town, yet is never able to meet her! It's clear Antonio is keeping a major secret, but will the truth be more than Angel can handle.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie and David
programme.desc: After Stephanie's parents' divorce, she begins to question whether she can trust people.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kim and Matt
programme.desc: Years after online chats, Kim is ready to meet Matt. Max and Nev attempt to bring the pair together, but their discoveries include secrets that may take Kim and Matt further apart.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Daisy and Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he stole her heart by helping her get through troubles at home. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone or meet her in person, so Nev and YouTube star Tyler Oakley arrange a face to face.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Anthony and Marq
programme.desc: Anthony is a veteran who met Marq online, but it seems like Marq may be hiding something.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joanna and Bo

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesus and Alexis

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Derek and Kristen

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Truth and Ray'Quan

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Morning Cookie
programme.desc: Matt's parents, Rod and Angela, move in with Matt and have their 'morning cookie' day and night and psychic powers can't save him now! Alexa kicks off her beauty pageant prep and Matt helps her pick out his perfect pageant dress.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Operation Pic Switch
programme.desc: Fed up with Matt's vanity, Maria and Alexa work together to teach him a lesson in humility. Rod tries to get Matt to embrace their Scottish roots with a shopping trip to the kilt store.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: When Heaven Calls, Matt Fraser Answers
programme.desc: When Matt goes to NYC to meet with the publishers of his new book, Angela nearly squashes the deal. Alexa is featured in a magazine for the upcoming beauty pageant, but not without Matt stealing her thunder.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Psychic vs. Skeptic
programme.desc: When Matt sets Maria up with an old friend, Maria gets more than she bargains for when she realizes her date is a little too similar to someone she knows. Rod's skepticism has Matt at the end of his rope.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Old Dog, New Tricks
programme.desc: When Matt tries to give his mom a lesson on how to use technology, she has some choice words for him. Meanwhile, Alexa is bummed her dad doesn't support her pageant dreams.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Matt, Queen of the Ball
programme.desc: Matt and Maria's parents' move back to Cranston bringing back some haunting memories for Maria. Alexa is concerned Matt will overshadow her in the big fashion show, but she has a bigger problem to contend with when the moms show up.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Bling Bling
programme.desc: Matt set up his plan to propose to Alexa, but Angela's not playing ball. While Alexa's dream is to marry Matt, she's starting to feel that the pageant crown might take a front seat to her dream of being Mrs. Matt Fraser.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Man Girdle
programme.desc: When Matt takes Alexa and the whole Fraser clan to Florida for a surprise proposal, the moms threaten to blow the surprise at every turn. Maria desperately tries to keep tabs on the moms, but to no avail.

programme.title: Meet the Frasers: Will You Marry Me?
programme.desc: The whole Fraser family is in Florida, and Matt is about to propose to Alexa when a tropical storm rolls into town.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Erika Jayne Girardi, K. Michelle, Rick Fox, Padma Lakshmi
programme.desc: 'The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills' star Erika Jayne Girardi reveals her sensitive side when Tyler reunites her with the dearly departed grandparents who raised her. Tyler helps R&B singer K. Michelle find closure with her aunt's premature passing.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Luann de Lesseps, Maddie Ziegler, Jax Taylor, Tom Sandoval and Tituss Burgess
programme.desc: Tyler lifts a huge weight of guilt off the shoulders of "The Real Housewives of New York" personality Luann de Lesseps when he shares a mysterious message from a recently departed friend.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: The Bella Twins, Dr. Paul Nassif, Metta World Peace, Tori Spelling
programme.desc: WWE Divas Brie and Nikki Bella reconnect with a long lost love who was tragically killed in high school. Later, 'Botched' star Dr. Nassif and his sister are brought to tears; Metta World Peace is shaken by Tyler; and Tori Spelling reconnects.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Rebel Wilson, Chris Harrison, Sofia Vergara
programme.desc: Rebel Wilson joins today to get a message from her family and Chris Harrison is left in disbelief. Then, Sofia Vergara receives a message from her deceased brother.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Audrina Patridge, Moby, Austin Mahone, Roselyn Sanchez
programme.desc: Tyler uncovers a disturbing family mystery with reality star Audrina Patridge. Moby is shocked when Tyler offers him very specific details directly from his deceased mother. Austin Mahone receives answers about his deceased father.

programme.desc: When Cami tells Delaware she doesn't want to take up a new hobby with her, Pam takes advantage and tries to steal Delaware as a best friend.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fill Bill/ Critterball Crisis
programme.desc: When the Greens dine at a seafood restaurant, Cricket and Tilly decide to rescue a live octopus.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Career Day Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Bennett-Blatt family navigate the ups and downs of family life in this series allowing the studio audience to vote on the outcome of key scenes.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny
programme.desc: Jessie accepts a job as a nanny and moves in with the Ross family: Christina, a former supermodel turned business mogul; Morgan, a famous movie director; their four kids Emma, Ravi, Luke and Zuri and their beloved Asian water monitor lizard.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part One: Frozen
programme.desc: When Booker freezes mid-vision, Raven takes him to Dr. Sleevemore, the same doctor who helped her when she was a teen.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part Two: Found
programme.desc: When Nia discovers that Booker’s visions went into her eye, Tess convinces her to keep the visions for the next couple of weeks.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Premiere-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When the premiere of Liv’s movie, 'Space Werewolves,' is scheduled for the same day as the beloved annual Stevens Point Cheddar-Brat Fest, Liv tries to make sure she can attend both events.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Pottery-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Because her injury prevents her from playing basketball, Maddie tries to find another hobby and focuses on trying to find out who Maddie Rooney really is. She jumps into creating pottery and tries to become the best potter ever.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Rockers and Writers
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to Ally, Austin and Dez 'borrow' one of her songs, record it, create a video and post it on the Internet after which it - and Austin - become a local sensation. When Austin needs another hit song, he pleads with Ally to write one for him.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Kangaroos and Chaos
programme.desc: Austin is eager to release another music video, so he puts the pressure on Ally to quickly finish the lyrics. However, in her haste to complete the song, she scribbles down the lyrics in illegible handwriting.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Welcome to Camp Kikiwaka
programme.desc: The Ross kids arrive at camp, only to discovery that the camp's owner, Gladys, is even scarier than the legendary creature that's rumoured to stalk the grounds. With the help of her sneaky niece Hazel, she's out to get the Ross kids.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gone Girl
programme.desc: Ravi becomes suspicious when he overhears Xander's plans for his first date with Emma. Meanwhile, Zuri and Jorge set up a secret business selling candy and video games to the campers.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie

programme.desc: When the special scarf Priya designed for the Queen goes missing, it's up to Mira to help find it! Mira juggles babysitting her cousin and searching for a missing bike.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon

programme.desc: Drs. Oakley and Doyle operate on a horse with a critical leg infection.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: The Miracle Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley tends to an ill reindeer and performs surgery on a canine burn victim.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: A Hoarse Horse
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley finds a fox in need, and the family rallies to give it a shot at survival.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Squawk Off!
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley explores what’s ailing a sick German shepherd and treats a prickly peacock.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Show Me the Honey
programme.desc: A vet assistant shadows Dr. Pol hoping to get into vet school.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pe-Pol's Choice
programme.desc: Some unique and surprising cases go on in the clinic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Dr. Emily, Dr. Brenda, and Dr. Pol take on big and small cases.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: K-9 to 5
programme.desc: It is K9 chaos at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Grizzly Battleground
programme.desc: North America doesn't get much colder, or any darker than Alaska in winter.

programme.title: The Planets: Jupiter: King of the Planets
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino leads a journey to Jupiter, the biggest and most extreme planet in our Solar System. Using new discoveries and the latest science, he investigates Jupiter's deepest mysteries and if it is actually our Sun's secret twin.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Earth: The Secret History
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino uses the latest science to reveal the strange secrets of planet Earth, and explores whether alien Earths exist elsewhere in the universe.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Ends of the Solar System: Strange Frontiers
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino uses the latest NASA discoveries to explore the dark and mysterious frontiers of our solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Attack of the Asteroids
programme.desc: New innovations in space technology are tracking asteroids that could one day threaten Earth. Using these cutting-edge advances, astronomers are discovering just how deadly these celestial monsters could be to our planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Asteroid Apocalypse: The New Threat
programme.desc: Explore the inner workings of outer space and how the earth was created.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Extinction
programme.desc: Asteroids strike, planets collide, black holes blast out death rays, volcanoes erupt and ice engulfs the planet. These are the universe's weapons of extinction. They've happened before - wiping out entire species, and they will happen again.

programme.title: Unearthed: Empire State Building: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech helps experts explore The Empire State Building, one of the wonders of the modern world, like never before, revealing the secrets of its construction and the mysteries hidden deep in its foundation.

programme.title: Unearthed: Statue of Liberty: The New Secrets
Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Nazi Treasure Train
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other in an apartment building become fast friends until becoming sworn enemies. Each enlists their sister as reinforcements in the escalating war between them; a conflict that ends in horrifically shocking violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighbors on a Dead End
programme.desc: A disabled fireman appoints himself sheriff of his street, policing his neighbors and clamping down on violations ranging from loud music to off leash dogs. Things boil over at a birthday party where shots are fired and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Have to Get Out
programme.desc: Edward Pehowic harbored dark secrets before he married Robin Healey, and she would catch only glimpses of her husband's dark side. But it wasn't until after she finally escaped from him once and for all that she realized just how evil he was.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When clues at Jennifer Dulos's New Canaan, Connecticut home prompt police to search for the missing mother, her estranged husband's behaviour deepens the mystery. A complex web of evidence secures arrests, but what happens next shocks the nation.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Vanished in New Canaan: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: When clues at Jennifer Dulos's New Canaan, Connecticut home prompt police to search for the missing mother, her estranged husband's behaviour deepens the mystery. A complex web of evidence secures arrests, but what happens next shocks the nation.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Bloodshed in the Bayou
programme.desc: After a mother is brutally slain in her home, police collect bizarre evidence they hope will lead to a murderer. When a second body turns up, this Louisiana community fears a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder at Sea
programme.desc: The small fishing town of Craig, Alaska is stunned when a premiere fishing boat explodes into flames just off shore. After fighting the flames, state troopers discover the remains of a young family and few clues as to could have set the ship blaze.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late. How would she keep herself and her son alive long enough to escape one of the most evil men in modern history?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: A father of three is murdered in his own home, stabbed 32 times with an X carved into his neck.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Vanished in Vegas
programme.desc: Detectives trace a path of haunting spirits, dark obsession, and greed investigating the disappearance of Las Vegas real estate developer, Ron Rudin.

programme.title: Body Cam: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: A relationship breakup turns deadly; a minor traffic stop puts a child's life at stake; a killer on the run leaves a State Trooper fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Disorderly Conduct
programme.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire. A stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action. A routine traffic stop results in an officer being shot and fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: Body Cam: Up Against the Clock
programme.desc: Police are hunting two suspects, responsible for a string of armed robberies; an undercover cop foils a double murder for hire plot; a known felon tries to force an officer off the road, stopping at nothing to escape arrest.

programme.title: Body Cam: High Stakes
programme.desc: A Detective leads his heavily armed team on a search warrant but ends up in the firing line himself; a routine traffic stop turns violent as the suspect makes a risky getaway; a knife wielding man draws police into a dangerous foot chase.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: Body Cam: Officer Down
programme.desc: Officers find themselves pitted against a lone gunman holed up in a suburban home; the nerve of a rookie cop is tested when a routine stop on the highway goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: See No Evil: Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Bright young college student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The family's search for their 19-year-old daughter hits every dead end... until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: One Chance, One Look
programme.desc: In Tempe, Arizona, millionaire entrepreneur Rick Chance is brutally gunned down in a hotel room. The senseless murder leaves his family heartbroken. To catch the killer, detectives turn to their most reliable witness -- surveillance video.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Kill Zone
programme.desc: Travel to California to witness the birth of a revolution in air warfare pushing science and technology to the limits, an unmanned bomber that can take-off and land on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Hard Target
programme.desc: FutureWeapons tests inflatable armour, the revolutionary shoulder fired grenades that double the range of weapons, the latest generation of the A10 Thunderbolt ground attack planes and the assault rifle round that stays supersonic out to 1200 yards.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Firepower
programme.desc: In this action packed episode we see the secret device that will tear apart terrorist bombs; the new squad weapon that will get you out of an ambush; the latest surface to air missile and the US Army's latest sniper rifle.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Close Protection
programme.desc: A look at a top secret device that stops terrorists from smuggling weapons onto planes, the newest multi-caliber combat weapon, the latest naval gun and one of the deadliest close quarter weapons.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Instant Grassification
programme.desc: A recently married couple has had their home on the market for over a year but they've been low on funds to make necessary improvements. Chris and Sarah help the couple with the neglected and overgrown lawn they have.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Edge of Maine
programme.desc: A creative family builds a three-story tiny house full of clever features in the easternmost property in the U.S. But with limited experience and a tight deadline, they'll need the help of a few locals to get it done. Follow their journey now.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Washington, DC
programme.desc: Adam's hunger takes him to Washington, DC, to 'Horace and Dickie's' and 'Ben's Chilli Bowl'.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Peanut Gallery
programme.desc: Alton Brown turns a handful of peanuts into some seriously delectable treats.

programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' this episode from season six with two new buttercreams, including one curious model flavored with buttermilk.

programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Father's Day Countdown / 20,000 Leagues Under the Lake
programme.desc: When Chloe's dad's flight home is cancelled on Father's Day, Keia and the pugs go on an urgent mission to bring him home. Then, when Dash and Duke's favourite toy goes missing, the pugs and Keia search the lake to find it.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Marketplace / Mystery in the Sand Dunes
programme.desc: When Meena wants to make special ladoos for her father's homecoming party, Mira must help track down the spice merchant who has an essential ingredient. Then, while testing Neel's new vehicle in the desert, a sandstorm causes it to become lost.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.desc: Romeo’s multiplying machine accidentally makes Catboy copies. Night Ninja challenges the PJ Masks to a game of Capture the Flag with the PJ Mask headquarters as the prize.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Looking After Gekko/ Catboy and Teeny Weeny Ninjalino

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Garage Alone/ Camp Happy Helpers

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette and the Flash Flip Trip/ Catboy and the Pogo Dozer
programme.desc: When Romeo erases all the stories from books, Owlette enlists the help of Flossy Flash. Romeo uses boxing gloves to break into the museum and steal a jetpack.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Armadylan and Robette Rule/ Armadylan Zen
programme.desc: Armadylan and sidekick, Robette, fight with Romeo to determine whose sidekick is better. After Armadylan loses his temper again, the PJ Masks take him on a zen trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Father's Day Countdown / 20,000 Leagues Under the Lake
programme.desc: When Chloe's dad's flight home is cancelled on Father's Day, Keia and the pugs go on an urgent mission to bring him home. Then, when Dash and Duke's favourite toy goes missing, the pugs and Keia search the lake to find it.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday
programme.desc: It's Mickey's birthday and the Clubhouse gang has organized fun activities for the big Mousekeday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Picnic
programme.desc: Minnie along with the help of her friends decides to organize the first picnic of many.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Comet
programme.desc: Mickey and pals are excitedly anticipating the arrival of Mickey's Comet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Playmate
programme.desc: Mickey and pals teach a visitor some new tricks for his debut in Mickey's Circus.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Petting Zoo
programme.desc: Goofy along with Mickey are on the search for the Zoo animals Goofy let escape from work.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Clubhouse Rocks
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals join together for a Clubhouse battle of the bands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Camp Out
programme.desc: In order to earn Clubhouse Camp Out Badges Mickey and his pals pair up with a buddy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Silly Problem
programme.desc: When the Clubhouse's Silly Switch gets stuck on silly, everything turns silly.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Sea Captain Mickey
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake’s sonar-detecting machine discovers that there’s something big at the bottom of Mickey Lake, Mickey and the gang hop into the Clubhouse Submarine and set out to find the 'Big Something'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and Minnie's Jungle Safari
programme.desc: Minnie is determined to snap a photo of the Hula Hibiscus that only blooms once a year.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower
programme.desc: With the help of Professor Von Drake's special Pitter Patter Glitter, Minnie and Daisy turn normal clouds into rain clouds so they can water their flower gardens in time for the big flower show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Animal Antics/ Here, Kitty, Kitty, Kitty!
programme.desc: The gang converts their roadsters into their favorite animals; Heist's kitty runs away.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Father's Day Countdown / 20,000 Leagues Under the Lake
programme.desc: When Chloe's dad's flight home is cancelled on Father's Day, Keia and the pugs go on an urgent mission to bring him home. Then, when Dash and Duke's favourite toy goes missing, the pugs and Keia search the lake to find it.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Marketplace / Mystery in the Sand Dunes
programme.desc: When Meena wants to make special ladoos for her father's homecoming party, Mira must help track down the spice merchant who has an essential ingredient. Then, while testing Neel's new vehicle in the desert, a sandstorm causes it to become lost.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Lost Lovey/ Diggity Dog
programme.desc: Mia loses Lovey, so Pip and Freddy go on a wild chase to find it. The Fliers' delivery is in jeopardy when their puppy student becomes the master at digging.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Frasier: Semi-Decent Proposal
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to escort his former high school prom queen to her birthday party.

programme.title: Frasier: A Passing Fancy
programme.desc: Frasier creates a love triangle when he tries to woo his date's friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Black Eye
programme.desc: The Mertzes won't accept Lucy's truthful explanation of how she got a black eye.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Changes Her Mind
programme.desc: Lucy can't seem to get dressed or order dinner at a restaurant without changing her mind.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: No Children Allowed
programme.desc: The Ricardos' lease has a clause that prohibits children from living in the complex.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Hires a Maid
programme.desc: Lucy keeps falling asleep during the day after staying up all night with the new baby.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Cindy Busby from the Hallmark original movie 'Wedding March 5: My Boyfriend's Back' stops by. TV chef and cookbook author Nick Stellino prepares his Tuscan style tortellini. Plus, TV host Mario Lopez and his wife Courtney visit.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Design
programme.desc: A home-makeover star is sent to her hometown to renovate a historic manor. An old flame is assigned to ensure her work preserves the history of the building and the two are forced to work closely together.

programme.title: The Office: Welcome Party

programme.desc: When Robert drunkenly shuts down a nearby branch, Jim and Dwight join forces to outsmart a salesman from Scranton's uglier sister city.

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio
programme.desc: A stolen diaper leads to a high-speed car chase. With help from an old boss, Andy goes undercover as a janitor and stages a takeover.

programme.title: The Office: New Guys

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding toast of Pam's ex fiancé Roy causes Pam and Jim to examine their relationship for buried secrets.

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry
programme.desc: Andy learns he is related to Michelle Obama and flaunts his bloodlines.

programme.title: The Office: Work Bus

programme.title: The Office: The Boat

programme.title: The Office: The Whale
programme.desc: Dwight finds himself needing to be able to sell to women so Pam and the ladies help him out.

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: Highlighting companies striving to make the lives of military veterans better through gainful career opportunities in areas including medical lab testing, analytics and support services, the oil industry--and through military housing communities.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Bed Spread
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover a new independence in their lives when they sleep in twin beds.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Less I

programme.desc: When friends begin complimenting Doug on his new svelte figure, Carrie becomes jealous, so Doug decides to take her on a special trip to make her feel better.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Nocturnal Omission

programme.title: The King of Queens: American Idle

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dougie Houser
programme.desc: Carrie reminds Doug why she makes all the decisions when he decides to buy a chainsaw.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Frigid Heirs

programme.title: The King of Queens: Switch Sitters

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cheap Saks
programme.desc: Carrie befriends one of Doug's ex-girlfriends and discovers why he broke up with her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Damned Yankee
programme.desc: Carrie gets angry when she catches Doug fantasizing about other women while he's sedated.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Multiple Plots
programme.desc: Arthur finds himself in a bit of a quandary when he tries to sell his extra burial plot.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.desc: It's Adam's birthday and the family is celebrating with a weekend trip at a Dude Ranch. The Busbys must make a difficult decision about the girls' schooling.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: My Busby Valentine
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, Adam is torn over how to make his little girls feel special during the holiday. Danielle throws the family a surprise they will never forget, and the Busby's learn about fire safety with an unexpected twist.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: I'm Not Dying!
programme.desc: Anna is finally ready to leave for college, and the excitement sets in as she and her sisters do some back to school shopping. A final family dinner gets tense as Trent upsets Emma. Move-in day finally comes and the small size of the dorm is a big shock.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Web of Destruction
programme.desc: As the sextuplets go from beginning to walk to running wild, Courtney and Eric are having a hard time keeping them contained. The big boys team up with the babies for an Easter egg hunt competition.

programme.desc: For the first time ever, we head back to school to transform two teachers' lounges with some A+ designs. Vern Yip and Carter Oosterhouse, Brett Tutor and Joanie Sprague and Paige Davis teach some lessons of their own.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: What to Expect When You're Expecting Six Babies
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric struggle through a high-risk delivery. Six premature babies must survive the NICU and prepare to come home during a national flu crisis. One baby takes a turn for the worse, as the family faces nonstop feedings and mounting expenses.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quintuple Trouble
programme.desc: Adam returns to work, leaving Danielle to care for the quintuplets and Blayke by herself for the first time. On Adam's first day back, Hazel falls ill with a fever, leaving the family scrambling and Danielle feeling overwhelmed and alone.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Should We Stay or Should We Go?
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle realize they need a larger home, but house hunting proves stressful when they realize what a larger house will cost. Later, the family heads back to their hometown, and Danielle comes up with an idea that could solve all their problems.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Pool Rules: No Spending
programme.desc: Homemaker Jeni Cox goes to sporting goods stores, using the exercise equipment on display in lieu of a gym membership. Realtor Lisa DiMercurio spends just three dollars to stage and sell her homes.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Terence/ Greg
programme.desc: Terence and Greg cause friction when others rebel against their bare-bones budgets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: Cooking instructor Ron Maestri shows us how to cook for lobster taste on a tunafish budget. Rocker Goldy Locks converted an abandoned hospital into her home, for just the fraction of the price.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa's Story
programme.desc: Jennifer and her daughter Marissa are stuck in a codependent relationship that has put both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. See if Jennifer can regain control and save both their lives before it's too late.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tommy's Story
programme.desc: Tommy wants to lose weight so he can marry his fiancée and have the life he always dreamed of with her, but to break the cycle of pathological eating that left him nearly bed-bound, he'll have to face a piece of his past he has always kept secret.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Rena and Lee's Story
programme.desc: Lee and Rena are battling health and anger issues while taking a desperate, second attempt to save their relationship and their lives.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Yasmine and Lewis

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tiana and James

programme.desc: The Sharks' taste buds go on a 'joy ride to flavour town' with this twist on traditional hummus. Then, an aesthetician wants to convince the Sharks they are just one wink away from investing in her eyelash extensions business.

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.desc: Even though Key West Key Lime Pie Company grosses an impressive $1.4 million a year, they are not turning a profit. With multiple storefronts and a shipping facility that's not bringing in any money, Marcus tries to get the owners back on track.

programme.desc: Mike and Scott Ciprari started SJC Drums in their grandma's basement, and quickly transformed it into a million-dollar company catering to the hottest bands. However, sibling rivalry and clashing egos forced Scott out of the company.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Arr in the Family/ Finders Weepers
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wants to help CJ to get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. Then, Ronnie and Sid decide whether to take money from a lost coin purse they found at the mercado.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Group Chat With Annie and Jayden: Slime Into Your DMs
programme.desc: Annie LeBlanc and Jayden Bartels chat, plank and scramble eggs with their faces, with special guests, 'To All The Boys' star Anna Cathcart and actress and model Peyton List.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble

programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: Friends: The One With a Chick and a Duck
programme.desc: It's a dream come true for Monica when Pete buys a restaurant and makes her head chef.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Screamer
programme.desc: Tommy, a seemingly nice young man, accompanies Rachel to the opening of Joey's play.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Thing
programme.desc: Ross develops a mysterious skin abnormality that his doctor cannot identify. Phoebe can't decide whether to date a fireman or a teacher. Monica believes that Pete is going to propose.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ultimate Fighting Championship
programme.desc: Pete's decision to compete in ultimate fighting forces Monica to make an important decision about their relationship. Phoebe sets Ross up on a date with a woman who used to be bald.

programme.title: Friends: The One at the Beach
programme.desc: Phoebe invites the gang to a Long Island beach house while she searches for her father. While there, Ross learns that Rachel still has feelings for him.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Jellyfish
programme.desc: After Ross reunites with Rachel, she wants him to take the blame for their breakup.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cat
programme.desc: Phoebe is convinced that a stray cat is really her deceased adoptive mom reincarnated.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cuffs
programme.desc: Chandler has a sexy encounter with Rachel's boss which leaves him in a predicament. Rachel is torn knowing she will put her job at risks if she helps him out.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey teaches the landlord to ballroom dance to keep Monica and Rachel from being evicted.

programme.title: Mom: Finger Guns and a Beef Bourguignon

programme.title: Mom: Crazy Hair and a Teeny Tiny Part of Canada
programme.desc: Bonnie and Adam make a hasty decision.

programme.title: Mom: Pilot

programme.desc: When Benny finds out that George's father is wealthy, she plans a get rich quick scheme.

programme.title: George Lopez: Girls Night Out
programme.desc: George and Angie invite trouble into their home when they take Marisol in out of sympathy.

programme.title: Full House: Greek Week

programme.title: Full House: Crimes and Michelle's Demeanor
programme.desc: Jesse pawns his guitar to pay for an engagement ring for Rebecca; Michelle is a handful.

programme.title: Full House: The I.Q. Man
programme.desc: Jesse reluctantly becomes an actor in a commercial that he has written with Joey.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Bunnies/ Puptacular

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: The Good, the Sad, and the Grumpy!
programme.desc: When Mr. Grumpfish turns up in Happy Junction, he makes everyone in town really grumpy.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Royal Mess

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Getting Glasses With Magenta

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Big Hairy/ Pups Save a Flying Kitty
programme.desc: Pups need to lure a big ape onto the PAW patroller so they can take him back to the jungle. Skye Kitty gets stuck beside an eagle's nest and needs help getting down. A baby eagle hides in Skye's copter and needs to be returned to its mother.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Parroting Pups/ Merpups Save the Turbots

programme.desc: Following the trial of a husband who stands accused of murdering his wife. The attorneys question the investigation and say the state rushed to judgement. The victim’s family is shocked by a dark secret in the husbands past.

programme.desc: Detectives delve into a victim's past, leading them on a trail lined with love and deceit. A detective and his team scramble for leads after a dead body is mysteriously dumped in an empty field.

programme.desc: The partially torched body of a prostitute is found; two shooting victims may be alive.

programme.title: The First 48: Moment of Truth/ Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: In Dallas, a woman is shot while sitting in her car. Det. Eddie Ibarra and the team focus on two suspects swept up in a robbery investigation. In Detroit, a young woman and her daughter are shot dead in their apartment.

programme.title: The First 48: Fatal Call
programme.desc: When a Dallas man is found shot to death in an apartment complex, the homicide team must rely on the eyes of the community to help solve the case.

programme.title: The First 48: Bicycle Bandits/ First Shot
programme.desc: In Miami, a recent high-school graduate is gunned down and left to die in his father's arms. Sgt. Eunice Cooper tries to track down the culprits. Elsewhere, Det. Jenny Luke is on the trail of a man who may have taken revenge on a childhood friend.

programme.title: The First 48: Carjacked/ Bad Connection
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the murder of a young man shot dead in an abandoned apartment. With little physical evidence, they must rely on witnesses to help them piece together the puzzle and find the killer.

programme.title: The First 48: Deadly Encounter/ Car Trouble
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives work the murder of a hard working janitor, brutally stabbed to death in his own apartment. In Birmingham, detectives investigate the murder of a man walking home after fixing a friend's car.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Aztec Portal
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Professional Help

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Tirdy Works: Professional Help

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rocking the Cradle

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
