programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Retreat

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Beast of the Bayou

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Super Yooper Sasquatch

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Bigfoot Basecamp

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Return to Four Corners

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Abominable Snowman

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Baby Bigfoot
programme.desc: The bigfoot research team heads to New York to investigate video of an alleged baby bigfoot.

programme.title: Movie: Power Rangers

programme.title: Movie: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

programme.title: Movie: Legion

programme.title: Love It or List It: Mother-in-law Matters
programme.desc: Stefanie and Jonathan are incredibly busy raising their twin daughters and are missing the full-time, live-in help they used to have from Jonathan's mother, Cindy. Cindy moved out because she did not enjoy living in the dark, unrenovated basement.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Couple Is Concerned Over the Functional Issues in Their Home

programme.title: Counting Cars: Framed
programme.desc: Horny Mike discovers a coveted bike frame on private property and convinces Danny to risk it all by sneaking inside.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Super Nova
programme.desc: Danny builds an extra special car for a customer who wants something no one else has.

programme.title: Counting Cars: You Talkin' to Me?
programme.desc: A Hollywood icon confronts Horny Mike and Roli in the shop parking lot. Danny tries to diffuse the situation before it gets explosive.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Get Your Kicks
programme.desc: Danny takes on a Route 66-inspired Chevy for the famed highway's biggest fan, and later teams up with his good buddy, American Restoration's Rick Dale, on an unusual project for a customer.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Horseplay
programme.desc: A high wire performer wants Danny to build a bike to commemorate his career and the records he has broken, and an Extreme Cowboy Racer wants the world's coolest trailer tricked out for her racing partner, Honey the Horse.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mustang Memories
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned to restore a family heirloom '67 Ford Mustang. He wants to make it a world-class, one-of-a-kind street machine, so he visits the home of the baddest Mustangs on Earth for inspiration: the Shelby Heritage Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chevys and Shelbys
programme.desc: Danny and the gang head to the Las Vegas Speedway for Ford Mustang's 50th Anniversary Celebration and the Count gets the rare chance to co-pilot one of Shelby's newest projects.

programme.title: Counting Cars: It Hurst So Good
programme.desc: The Plymouth Road Runner has always eluded Danny, but when he finally finds one and buys it, it becomes a nightmare for Kevin. When Kevin tries to shut down the project, Danny pulls a fast one.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Big Money Bike
programme.desc: Danny builds a world-class bike for a high end client, and if all goes well it could mean a ton of new business for the shop.

programme.desc: The Turbinator, the vehicle holding a land speed record, needs a paint job to make it look as fast as it goes. Danny decides the crew should be there in Bonneville, Utah when it goes for the speed record again.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bonneville Bound Part 2
programme.desc: Ryan and Kevin go to the Bonneville Salt Flats to see The Turbinator try to break 500 MPH. Back at the shop, Davey Deals asks Danny to help him sell a classic 1951 Nash, and Mike and Paul trick out an electric bike.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Battle of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Unearthed: Titanic: The Last Secrets
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into the sinking of the Titanic reveals new discoveries that might finally explain the mysteries of her last moments, and experts get closer to a shocking secret: if there was a way to save almost everyone on board.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Battle of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Features heart-pounding dives, watery graveyards and ancient puzzles from the ocean floor.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister

programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Monsters: Doomsday Flood Fortress
programme.desc: The Netherlands is home to the most advanced water defense system on the planet, protecting millions with hi-tech, fortress-like barriers; engineers show how this sophisticated water control network works as it faces its greatest challenge yet.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Monsters: Dynamos of the Deep
programme.desc: A fleet of cutting-edge sea machines are using the power of the oceans to revolutionize the energy industry, and the innovative engineering behind these hi-tech behemoths could change the world.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: US Navy Super Fleet
programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Monsters: Iceberg Air Force
programme.desc: A fleet of ice-fighting mega machines has transformed 'Iceberg Alley' into the world's largest frozen battlefield, where cutting-edge engineering helps neutralize swarms of deadly icebergs that threaten valuable shipping lanes and offshore exploration.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watching Dru
programme.desc: Young student Dru Sjodin suddenly vanishes after her shift at Victoria's Secret. Investigators turn to the best eyewitness they have: surveillance camera footage. Dru's last movements are traced and reveal the chilling reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Look of Summer
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill, detectives race to discover the killer behind the brutal crime. With no leads, police turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's chilling attempt to cover his tracks.

programme.title: See No Evil: On Her Watch
programme.desc: On March 18th, 2011, 32-year-old Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police find the safe open and a mysterious message next to Patty's body. They turn to surveillance video - and it's there the killer emerges from the shadows.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: The Truth Behind Joe Exotic: The Rick Kirkham Story
programme.desc: In his claimed last interview regarding 'Tiger King,' TV producer Rick Kirkham opens up in an explosive tell-all to expose the truths behind what he saw at the G.W. Zoo and his time with the eccentric figure, Joe Exotic.

programme.title: Body Cam: Deception
programme.desc: In Florida, after a high-speed chase, a Sheriff's K9 is let loose on its first pursuit. Deputies in an Arkansas jail face a battle, when inmates turn violent. In Georgia, officers head into the woods to hunt down a violent felon.

programme.title: Body Cam: Long Shot
programme.desc: An Arizona mother triggers a desperate search for her son, who is armed and suicidal. An Ohio officer fights for his life when a suspect overpowers him. When a Wisconsin man shoots his co-workers police must find him to stop the threat.

programme.title: Body Cam: Long Shot
programme.desc: An Arizona mother triggers a desperate search for her son, who is armed and suicidal. An Ohio officer fights for his life when a suspect overpowers him. When a Wisconsin man shoots his co-workers police must find him to stop the threat.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: 20-year old Justin Newman lands a great job in construction, but when he disappears on the day his new boss is found brutally murdered, a nation-wide search for Justin uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Going Places
programme.desc: A 39-year old woman, Melissa Lewis, has just made partner at a prestigious law firm, but when she is found murdered in a particularly personal manner.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Lone Star Mystery
programme.desc: The crime rate in rural Royse City, TX is almost non-existent. So when quiet couple Dennis and Norma Woodruff is found murdered in their own home, it sends shock waves through town. As police investigate, it seems the killings...are a family affair.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Bewitching Hour
programme.desc: In Traverse City, MI, 16-year-old Kathey Horn vanishes into the night. As police work tirelessly to find her, they uncover an underworld in their majestic town filled with nomadic hippies, witches and cults.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Into the Woods
programme.desc: When Jessi Evans and Jake Wheeler go fishing - and never come home - the townsfolk of Norris City, IL fear the worst. Then, after Jake's truck is found at an abandoned house, detectives uncover a twist that rocks this God-fearing community to its core.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Dear Katherine, It's Me the Killer
programme.desc: When 18-year-old freshman Katherine Foster goes missing, terror strikes the heart of the University of South Alabama. Has she been abducted? Raped? Is there a killer in their midst? Rumors fly, as students fear the worst ... anyone could be next.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Hilltop Horror
programme.desc: When 55-year-old Monica Schmeyer is found shot to death in her living room, the people of Hanover, Pennsylvania are in a state of panic; investigators don't know who would want to kill this gentle woman and they have few clues to go on.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Risky Business
programme.desc: When Bob Eidman is found executed in his office in broad daylight, the people of St. Charles are terrified a cold-blooded killer is on the loose. But when police discover Bob's secret life, they expose a slew of suspects with motive for murder.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Criss-Cross Killer
programme.desc: When Veronica Bozza's body is found bleeding on her living room floor, it sends shockwaves through the close-knit community of Bridgewater. The murder plot leads Nashville's finest to uncover a bizarre unexpected twist right out of a Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Every Step You Take

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: Everyone loves 25-year-old Sandy Jeffers, but little does she know that one man is completely obsessed with her. When she finally comes face to face with her stalker, the events that follow are twisted, torturous, and ultimately fatal.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Behind the Barn

programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Tanks
programme.desc: No modern military is complete without one. Go inside the fiercest tanks to ever storm the battlefield, as they unleash ferocious firepower and destroy all challengers.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Underground Living
programme.desc: Specialty builders Jon and Amanda D'Aleo design and build 'Earth-sheltered' homes for clients in Southern Colorado, but they weren't expecting a project this far off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Michael Reynolds is an architect and visionary that created the Earthship. Earthships are houses that are completely self-sufficient and totally off the grid with no electricity or water bills - ever.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Stuccoed to Sell
programme.desc: A couple with too little time to invest in lawn care doesn't think their house will sell in its current state. Chris and Sara rescue their property from dying plants and a mismatched exterior by adding fresh paint, a patio and a stone path.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Small
programme.desc: Rachel Street tackles a tiny row home in South Philly's Whitman district. After extending the second floor to add an additional 150 square feet, she makes the space seem brighter and larger by white washing the interior brick and using light colours.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Anything But Basic
programme.desc: Rachael takes on a builder-basic row home in Philadelphia's East Passyunk neighborhood and intends to flip it fast. Her plan for converting this home into a designer-chic abode includes rebuilding the kitchen peninsula and creating entertaining space.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Colorful Spanish Colonial Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1930s two-story Spanish Colonial farmhouse in Fontana, California. He learns the rich history of the home which then guides his design plan for the house exterior, entryway, living room and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: Dutch Colonial Done Right
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1918 Dutch Colonial home in Upland, California for a woman moving back in with her mother. The family would like to see the house restored to its former glory. Brett quickly learns this house is a time capsule full of discoveries.

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Fixins
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Florida fanning the flames for something savory and something sweet. Roger heads to Hamaknockers Bar-B-Que in Crawfordville, where a young pitmaster pulls pork with a power tool!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Heaven
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in pig paradise, cooking up two whole hogs in two different styles.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Queens of 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger meets with two Southern ladies famous in the barbecue world. In Nashville, Roger has eyes only for the smoked ribs at Mary's Old Fashioned Pit Bar-B-Que.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: All You Can Feast
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes to Llano Seco Ranch in Chico, Calif., where he and Charlie Thieriot slow roast a 30-pound porchetta. In Sandy, Ore., Rogers meets caterers Jaret Foster and Mona Johnson and assists in roasting mussels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Triple Meat Trifecta
programme.desc: In Newport, R.I., Michael Symon dives into a triple meat-stacked sandwich with smoked pork belly, bologna and chicken liver pate. A decadent, ultra-crispy and deep-fried soft-shell crab patty in San Francisco will change the way you look at burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue Boss of All Sandwiches
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a meaty stacked sandwich and a beefy ballpark dog. In Oklahoma City, a gas station-turned-burger joint serves a fried apple and brie cheeseburger to fuel the soul.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast
programme.desc: In Memphis, Michael Symon sits down with four generations of barbecue royalty for the scoop on their most delicious family secrets, with a side of smoked turkey and sweet potato fried pie.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: It's a Small World Pies
programme.desc: Bakers compete in a speedy elimination round with mini marshmallows as the mystery ingredient.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Picnic Cupcakes
programme.desc: Following an elimination round with lemonade as the mystery ingredient, the two finalists compete for $10,000 in a picnic-themed cupcake showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Baseball Donuts
programme.desc: Three donut makers have to successfully incorporate mint in their elimination round dishes, in order to make it to the baseball themed donut showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Garden Pies

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: St. Patrick's Day Donuts
programme.desc: Donut makers take on pineapple in their speedy elimination round before competing for the $10,000 prize in a St. Patrick's Day-themed donut showdown.

programme.title: Sugar Showdown: Spring Cakes
programme.desc: Three bakers compete in an elimination round using beets, two make it to the spring-themed cake showdown, and one will walk away $10,000 richer.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phuket
programme.desc: Andrew explores the alluring eats of Phuket, Thailand, an island paradise with bountiful natural gifts, aromatic flavors and multicultural cuisine. From spicy crab curry to sweet, crispy street snacks, Phuket's gastronomy is a feast for the senses.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: St. Louis
programme.desc: As the Gateway to the West, St. Louis has built a reputation for homegrown goodness on the backs of its hard-working people. Andrew Zimmern explores such edible icons as St. Louis-style BBQ, toasted ravioli and gooey butter cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch

programme.desc: Phoebe and Joey wait for their friends to arrive for a celebration at a fancy restaurant.

programme.title: Seinfeld: Male Unbonding
programme.desc: Jerry tries to end a friendship with Joel, a guy he has known and disliked for years.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Fight to the Finish
programme.desc: Molly gets angry at Mike for not listening to her vent about writing with Peggy and they go their separate ways for a day.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dead From the Waist Down
programme.desc: Alan gets creative when he discovers that he can't afford to buy Lyndsey a nice birthday present.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: A Goldberg Thanksgiving
programme.desc: As a bet, Beverly challenges Erica to participate in Jazzercise after she thinks her mom's obsession is lame. When she wins, Erica decides to opt out of celebrating Thanksgiving so Beverly must find a way to win her daughter back.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Edward 'Eddie the Eagle' Edwards
programme.desc: When Barry sees underdog Eddie the Eagle in the Olympics, he decides to popularize Ball Ball in order to gain respect at school. Meanwhile, Beverly catches wind that Murray's store sales are down and intervenes by selling the latest furniture craze.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Piece of Sheet
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for buying hair extensions with their joint funds, Caroline splurges on a new bedding set for Max but gives the old one to charity, not realizing her old pillowcase has sentimental value.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Dust in the Wind
programme.desc: Malik's reading challenges are revealed during Walter's memorial service. He and Kelly forge an alliance after Malik's embarrassing reading. A grieving Tasha is able to help Blue and Chardonnay truly say goodbye to their failed relationship.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mother Fracker
programme.desc: After Vanessa's complex presentation to Eve's class on career day about her work for an oil company, the class quickly turns on Vanessa and accuses her of destroying Mother Earth.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Dickerson vs. Manuel
programme.desc: A woman discovers a mysterious apartment lease in her boyfriend’s car and suspects he’s leading a double life with another woman.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Fumigation Fail/ Burgers and Beer Gone Bad
programme.desc: An apartment is contaminated after being fumigated without the resident's consent. Injury results from an eating contest.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: House Sitter From Hell/ Leading Lady
programme.desc: A house sitter throws a party at neighbor’s house; a lead actress fails to fulfil her commitment for a play.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Williams/ Mayberry vs. Winn
programme.desc: A woman has no recollection of her sexual history with the man claiming to have fathered her 35-year old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: My Aunt Is Insane/ Mommy's Credit Card
programme.desc: Woman sues her niece for unpaid rent; a child makes an unauthorized donation to charity.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Panty Proof
programme.desc: Courtney is about to faceoff with her boyfriend Justin’s mistress, Brooklyn! He introduced Courtney to Brooklyn initially so they could be friends and Courtney would have someone to hang out with.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her former friend for an unpaid gas bill. Her friend admits she did fall behind in the payments, but the Plaintiff had the gas completely shut off before she could get caught up.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Vexing An Ex' and ' Landlubbers.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Unfriending A Friend ' and 'I Didn't Do It.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Knocked Down and Dragged Out/ Pilfered and Pawned
programme.desc: Man sues for medical bills; man claims ex-girlfriend pawned his property.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring; the defendant claims her ex-fiancé is a and she shouldn’t have to return the ring. Then, neighbours dispute a botched car sale where the seller didn't mention the car was repossessed.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Past Guest DNA Updates
programme.desc: Amanda and Eli were teenagers when they came on the show for cheating two years ago. After the show, Eli says Amanda broke his heart when she left him and moved. Now he believes he is the father of her child.

programme.title: Maury: More Maury After the Results ... The Gloves Are Off!
programme.desc: We recap stories from past guests and their journeys followed by some never before seen footage of what happened after they received the results.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Jerry Is the Champ
programme.desc: The action is back and better than ever. Venessa is about to move into her man's place, but her best friend Mondo has a confession to make. Plus, Deanna is here to find out once and for all if her man has been faithful.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Extreme Entitlement
programme.desc: Meet a mom facing bankruptcy because she spoils her teens with clothes, cars and phones. Mel goes into the true cost of overindulging your kids.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: John and Jane Smith are bored with their domestic life, but both lead a double life. They are deadly assassins, although neither knows about the other, and they are assigned to kill each other after they both miss their latest target.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Hogs
programme.desc: A group of middle-aged men try to put their troubles behind them as they set out on a road trip on their Harleys.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Tig Notaro: Boyish Girl Interrupted
programme.desc: Tig Notaro performs in front of a live audience at the Wilbur Theatre in Boston.

programme.title: Movie: Green Card
programme.desc: A French composer marries an American woman in an attempt to obtain a green card.

programme.title: Movie: Betsy's Wedding
programme.desc: The parents of a bride and groom try to outdo each other while arranging the wedding.

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Mel Brooks and Dick Cavett Together Again
programme.desc: Comedy legend Mel Brooks and talk-show pioneer Dick Cavett talk life and the stories of old Hollywood that have spanned their multi-decade careers in an informal give-and-take in front of a live audience at the Saban Theatre in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Movie: This Means War
programme.desc: Two CIA agents wage war against each other when they find out they have been dating the same woman.

programme.title: Movie: In Bruges
programme.desc: Two hitmen become stuck in Bruges after a job and start to think of life in a new light.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director solicits a young prostitute who dreams of becoming an actress. Not only does she land a role in his latest play, but she'll be acting alongside his wife, the star of the show.
